summary: Iteration 7 testing - Live Classes & Payment Fixes. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). All APIs working correctly. Frontend: Code review confirms all 3 fixes correctly implemented. Infrastructure issue (ngrok tunnel) prevented UI testing, but code implementation verified.

infrastructure_issues.issue: Ngrok tunnel connection failing with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading body)' error
infrastructure_issues.impact: Frontend preview not accessible for UI testing
infrastructure_issues.note: This is an environment/infrastructure issue, not related to code changes. Backend APIs are fully functional.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: POST /api/payments/create-order returns order_id, amount, key_id (200 OK)
✓ Backend: Payment order creation stores order in database with status 'created'
✓ Backend: POST /api/live-classes creates live class with title, course_id, scheduled_at, meeting_url (200 OK)
✓ Backend: Live class response includes id, title, course_id, scheduled_at, meeting_url, description, status='scheduled', created_at
✓ Backend: GET /api/live-classes returns list with course_name enriched from courses collection
✓ Backend: Live classes list sorted by scheduled_at descending (most recent first)
✓ Backend: PUT /api/live-classes/{id} can update status to 'live' (200 OK)
✓ Backend: Updating status to 'live' triggers push notification to all users
✓ Backend: DELETE /api/live-classes/{id} deletes live class and returns success (200 OK)
✓ Backend: GET /api/materials/{id}/view returns HTML with embedded PDF (content-type: text/html)
✓ Backend: Material view HTML contains <!DOCTYPE html>, <embed> tag, and base64 PDF data
✓ Backend: Admin login with krsittu@gmail.com / Indra@4 works correctly (200 OK, role=admin)
✓ Frontend Fix 1: Payment order_id stored in state variable 'currentOrderId' (line 26, course/[id].tsx)
✓ Frontend Fix 1: setCurrentOrderId(orderData.order_id) called after create-order API (line 95)
✓ Frontend Fix 1: currentOrderId used in verifyPayment function (line 147)
✓ Frontend Fix 1: No regex extraction from HTML - direct state storage
✓ Frontend Fix 2: PDF viewer opens in in-app Modal (not browser download)
✓ Frontend Fix 2: pdfViewer state with visible, url, title fields (line 28)
✓ Frontend Fix 2: downloadMaterial sets pdfViewer state instead of opening browser (line 72)
✓ Frontend Fix 2: Modal with testID='pdf-viewer-modal' renders WebView (lines 279-288)
✓ Frontend Fix 2: WebView loads /api/materials/{id}/view URL (line 286)
✓ Frontend Fix 2: Modal has close button with testID='close-pdf' (line 282)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Live classes fetched from /api/live-classes on home screen (line 28)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: liveClasses state stores fetched data (line 19)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: 'Upcoming Live Classes' section renders when liveClasses.length > 0 (lines 73-95)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Live class card shows title (line 85), course_name (line 88), scheduled_at (line 89)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Live class card has testID='live-class-{id}' (line 79)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Card shows 'LIVE' badge when status='live' (line 86)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Card shows 'Join' button when status='live' (line 91)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Clicking live class opens meeting_url via Linking.openURL (line 79)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Filters out ended classes (lc.status !== 'ended') (line 78)
✓ Frontend Fix 3: Shows max 3 live classes on home (slice(0, 3)) (line 78)
✓ Code Quality: Payment modal uses WebView component (imported line 5)
✓ Code Quality: Payment modal has testID='payment-modal' (line 259)
✓ Code Quality: Razorpay WebView has testID='razorpay-webview' (line 272)
✓ Code Quality: LiveClassModel validates title, course_id, scheduled_at, meeting_url (lines 266-271)
✓ Code Quality: Live class creation sends push notification to all users (lines 1034-1038)
✓ Code Quality: Material view endpoint serves HTML with embedded PDF (lines 662-676)
✓ Code Quality: All MongoDB _id fields excluded from responses
✓ Code Quality: All endpoints use proper HTTP status codes (200, 401, 404, 500)
✓ Code Quality: Admin authentication required for create/update/delete operations
seed_data_creation: Created 4 test live classes during testing: TEST_Live_Class_Polity, TEST_Live_Class_History, TEST_Live_Class_Geography, TEST_Live_Class_ToDelete (deleted). Created 1 test material: TEST_Material_View (deleted after test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 implements 3 fixes: (1) Payment verification - order_id now stored in state variable 'currentOrderId' instead of regex extraction from HTML. (2) PDF viewer - opens in full-screen in-app Modal with WebView (not browser download). Modal has close button and testID='pdf-viewer-modal'. (3) Live classes - new backend endpoints POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/live-classes. Student home fetches /api/live-classes and shows 'Upcoming Live Classes' section with title, course_name, scheduled_at. Live classes can be updated to status='live' which triggers push notification. Backend: All 8 tests passed (100%). Admin login works with krsittu@gmail.com / Indra@4. Frontend: All 3 fixes correctly implemented in code. Note: Ngrok tunnel had connection issues during testing (infrastructure issue), but code review confirms correct implementation.
rca_of_issue: All 3 fixes correctly implemented. No code issues found. Backend APIs fully functional (8/8 tests passed). Frontend code review confirms: (1) currentOrderId state variable stores order_id from API response (line 95), used in verifyPayment (line 147) - no regex extraction. (2) pdfViewer Modal opens with WebView loading /api/materials/{id}/view (lines 72, 279-288) - not browser download. (3) Live classes fetched and rendered on home screen with title, course_name, scheduled_at (lines 28, 73-95). Infrastructure issue: Ngrok tunnel connection failing prevented UI testing, but this is environment-related, not code-related.
